text.title: Vision Language Model Provider Selection Core Rules

rule.statement: Choose GPT-4o vision when reliable structured output (JSON mode) + 128K context + tool-use are required together.
rule.rationale: GPT-4o is the only 2026 VLM with all three at production stability.

rule.statement: Choose Claude 3.5/3.7 Sonnet vision when long-document OCR + extended reasoning are the priority.
rule.rationale: Anthropic vision excels on long PDFs; 200K context covers most contracts.

rule.statement: Choose Gemini 2.x when 2M-context multimodal grounding (long video + many images) is required.
rule.rationale: Gemini is the only 2026 VLM with 2M context.

rule.statement: Choose Llava-Onevision / Qwen-VL when self-hosting, data residency, or fine-tuning is required.
rule.rationale: Closed APIs cannot fine-tune; open VLMs run on commodity GPUs.

rule.statement: Cost model MUST express price per image (not per token) — VLM billing is image-tile-based.
rule.rationale: Token-based budgets under-count VLM cost by 3-5×.
